examples: Some people are taking their friends shopping with them, and buying their Christmas presents in the sales—a practical but unromantic way of making sure you get the gift you really want.
Why do you think blenders and toaster ovens are so notoriously unromantic?
Internally searing at how unromantic the gift was, she looked up to find her boyfriend beaming.
The most unromantic dinner for two in the history of epic eating recently went down outside Seattle.
